text.title: AI PM Recipes Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-recipe output schemas and the cross-cutting invariants every recipe enforces.

list.item: jira_project_keys (array)
headline (string, <= 120 chars)
tickets (array of {key, status, assignee, last_update, summary})
risk_callouts (array of {ticket_key, risk_class, severity, why}; max 8)
word_count (integer; <= 800)
cost_usd (float; recipe halts if cumulative day-cost > cap)
triggered_by_pr (PR URL)
affected_components (array)
register_changes (array of {risk_id, before_severity, after_severity, rationale})
new_risks_identified (array of new risk entries with id, severity, owner_TBD ok)
participants (array)
what_worked (array of strings)
what_didnt (array of strings)
actions (array of {description, owner, due_date_utc OR owner_TBD})
blockers (array of strings)
Every recipe writes its full LLM-output JSON to a `runs/` folder for audit.
Every recipe records the model name + provider + version used.
Dry-run output is identical in shape to live output.
PM signoff is recorded as a commit in the recipe repo OR as a tracked entry in a signoff log.

antipattern.description: Free-text LLM output posted to Slack / Jira without schema validation.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Structured output is required.

antipattern.description: Digest exceeding 800 words or 8 risk callouts.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Budget caps protect signal.

antipattern.description: Retro notes output missing one of the four sections.
antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Section coverage is the floor.

antipattern.description: Live mutation without PM signoff record.

list.item: Every recipe's output validates against its schema before any side effect.
Cost cap defined and observed per recipe.
runs/ folder is rotated weekly; runs older than 30 days archived or deleted.
Signoff history retrievable for audit.
